criteria.description: Open with a quantified finding, not the methodology.
criteria.evidence: Summary contains numbers and the first section is a finding.

criteria.description: Quantitative claims per section ≥ 2.0 (numbers anchor every finding).
At least one explicit anomaly callout (something deviates from baseline).
At least 2 quantified comparisons (vs baseline, vs peer chain, vs prior period).
Connects findings to actions or implications for specific personas.
Caveats reference real numbers / specific tables, not generic warnings.
criteria.evidence: caveats section: 511 chars, with quantitative anchors

criteria.description: Provides downloadable data (CSV / parquet) alongside the rendered figures.
